description: This section presents the DEL'AR® product line of flavorings and taste additives, offered by SOYUZSNAB Group since 2006. The collection encompasses several key categories: a diverse range of natural and nature-identical flavorings for beverages with profiles from fruits and berries to spicy and exotic options; flavor bases for energy drinks containing caffeine, vitamins and other active components; flavor bases with herbal and tea extracts; emulsion flavorings that provide both taste and characteristic cloudiness; juice-containing flavorings with various fruit and berry tastes; and complex juice-containing flavor bases. The section includes detailed chapters on: general introduction to the DEL'AR® collection, comprehensive alphabetical catalog of flavorings, specialized flavor bases for energy drinks, natural bases for energy drinks containing plant extracts and L-carnitine, flavor bases with herbal and tea extracts that provide functional properties, emulsion flavorings that add both flavor and visual appeal to beverages, juice-containing flavorings with concentrated apple juice, and complex juice-containing flavor bases that simplify production processes. All products feature technological effectiveness, standardized composition, and stability during pasteurization, allowing beverage manufacturers to expand their product range without altering existing production schemes.

simple_flavors.description:
This section includes flavorings of various taste groups adapted for the beverage market. Flavorings are designed for both alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages. They do not comply with GOST, as they are developed for flexibility in use and maximum flavor compositions disclosure. All presented flavorings do not contain natural extracts, but are created on the basis of identical to natural flavoring substances.

Taste groups and flavorings examples:
Citrus - convey bright, fresh and tart shades of citrus fruits.
Examples: Orange (natural), Bitter lemon (Schweppes type).
Berry - rich and sweet tastes of ripe berries.
Examples: Strawberry, Natural lingonberry.
Fruit - juicy and natural fruit flavors.
Examples: Pear "Duchesse", Cherry-sweet cherry.
Vanilla-creamy - soft, creamy and creamy shades.
Examples: Vanilla-ice cream, Caramel.
Chocolate-confectionery - combination of notes of chocolate, coffee and pastry.
Examples: Cappuccino, Florentine cocoa.
Alcoholic shades - flavorings with characteristic notes of alcoholic beverages.
Examples: Whiskey, Mulled wine.
Herbal and spicy - taste and aroma of herbs, Tea, spices and exotic plants.
Examples: Basil, Aloe, Tea.
Nutty and cereal - soft, warm and slightly tart tastes.
Examples: Bitter almond, Amoretto.
These flavorings help to diversify the taste solutions of beverages, creating unique and memorable combinations.

flavors_for_energy_drinks.description: This section details the DEL'AR® complex flavor bases specifically designed for energy beverages. These solutions feature various popular taste profiles ranging from red berries to tropical fruits, enriched with vitamins and energy-enhancing components. The product line includes specialized bases such as 'Red Berries T', 'Energy G', 'Complex AR' (analogous to Adrenaline Rush), and other berry-flavored options. These bases are characterized by technological efficiency, standardized active ingredient composition, stability during pasteurization, and require no special storage conditions, ultimately streamlining the production process while ensuring consistent quality.

product_list.name: ОСНОВА ВКУСОАРОМАТИЧЕСКАЯ «КРАСНЫЕ ЯГОДЫ Т»
product_list.description: Вкусоароматические основы DEL'AR® для энергетических напитков представляют собой сиропообразную жидкость, содержащую кофеин, комплекс витаминов, вкусоароматические компоненты и краситель, с возможным добавлением таурина. Данная продукция отличается широким ассортиментом вкусовых профилей от красных ягод до тропических фруктов, обеспечивая высокую технологичность применения благодаря стандартизации по содержанию активных компонентов и устойчивости к процессу пастеризации.
product_list.usage_benefits: комплексные основы удобны в применении и технологичны; упрощают технологический процесс: исключают стадию дополнительного поиска и подготовки сырья; основы выдерживают процесс пастеризации 93-95 °С, что немаловажно при производстве прохладительных напитков без использования консервантов; снижают себестоимость готового напитка на 30% за счет применения основы российского производства; низкие дозировки по сравнению с аналогичными предложениями на рынке; не требуют изменения технологического процесса и специальных условий хранения; стандартизированы по содержанию активных компонентов

flavors_for_energy_tea_herbs.description: This section covers the DEL'AR® flavor bases with natural herbal and tea extracts, designed to impart special taste characteristics and functional properties to beverages. All products contain only natural extracts. The range includes bases with oregano, rosehip, rosemary, mint, chamomile, green and black tea extracts, as well as specialized bases that provide astringency and kvass flavor. These products leverage natural plant components to enhance both the sensory profile and the functional benefits of the final beverage. The section also describes natural energy bases containing plant adaptogen extracts (like ginseng) and L-carnitine, developed for creating natural energy drinks without synthetic additives while maintaining stability during technological processing.

juice_based_flavors.description: This section presents two categories of DEL'AR® juice-containing products. First, the juice-containing flavorings specifically developed for beverages with added juice, featuring concentrated apple juice, colorants, and natural aromatic substances. These flavorings provide tastes closely resembling natural fruits in varieties including pineapple, cherry, pomegranate, pear, strawberry, cranberry, raspberry, peach, black currant, exotic blends, apple, and sweet cherry. Second, the complex juice-containing flavor bases that represent concentrated mixtures with juice, flavorings, and colorants. These comprehensive bases simplify beverage production by reducing the need for separate ingredient procurement while ensuring consistent quality and natural taste. The range includes options like Orange-Mango, Pomegranate (variants B, G, F, GT), Black Currant, Exotic (mango, passion fruit), Apple-Pear, Cider, Multi-fruit, Cherry D, Raspberry, and natural Lemon. These products are used to replace concentrated juices in beverages.
